channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: For the "small test" they've modified their docs to remove mention of Claude Code in Claud...
item.description:
For the "small test" they've modified their docs to remove mention of Claude Code in Claude Pro: https://t.co/cG75PWlZyj
It's been a shock to see Anthropic's integrity collapse in the face of commercial pressure. Would love a renewed commitment to straightforward honesty.
--- @jeremyphoward | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 436
item.author: @jeremyphoward

item.title: The most puzzling thing about this: if they want people to spend $100/month on Claude Code surely th...
item.description:
The most puzzling thing about this: if they want people to spend $100/month on Claude Code surely those people need a $20/month option to try it out first?
Who's going to drop $100 just to try it?
--- @simonw | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 675
item.author: @simonw

item.title:
OK, here's a resolution - I managed to get it to think using these settings:

item.author: @simonw

item.title: RT @ClementDelangue: I’m hearing there’s renewed lobbying in DC and in state legislatures to ban or ...
item.description:
RT @ClementDelangue: I’m hearing there’s renewed lobbying in DC and in state legislatures to ban or severely restrict open-source.
Like a…

"Fine-tune a Segment Anythi...
item.description:

item.title: My hunch for now is that this was an ill-considered test which they didn't anticipate would be insta...
item.description:
My hunch for now is that this was an ill-considered test which they didn't anticipate would be instantly spotted and cause (justified) uproar - here's hoping they decide that the "test" isn't a good idea!
If they do go ahead I expect OpenAI Codex to catch Claude Code very fast
--- @simonw | ❤️ 101 | 🔁 4 | 💬 12 | 👁 4266
item.author: @simonw
